content: Submitted my readings today.

Despite emails and chats saying the totals don’t add up for usage,  
No readings at all some days then same usage reading 3 days the same. I have no in-house reader as mine was faulty and have been told they no longer give them out, I thought this was the point of having a smart meter!!!!

Ridiculous now. Email/password, Email with code sent, come off Scot Power app to email app. Can’t open both at same time to view code to enter code on phone app. Tried copy code (to paste in box), back to Scot Power app, but can’t enter code as it goes back to email/password enter box. Also when open app, tap log in - takes me to website! As someone else it’s easier getting on a banking app than this. This is just an energy account no one else can use it really anywhere else. Try a text message code instead - I’ve used that on apps/website and the notification appears over the app/page I’m viewing.

Why do you keep advising me to have a Smart Meter when the Engineer has been to assess the situation and advised me that it is not possible to fit one!! Second review of the day. Why are we getting all these stupid games and jigsaws. All I want to do is put my meter readings in. It was much easier to do on the old version. As an 80 year old women, I found the previous version easy. This updated version is overly complicated. I only want to put my metre readings in and can’t get to the correct page.

Meter Readings

The next meterreading is due and I haven’t changed my opinion. This new version is a complete mystery to me. How do you put your meter readings in? I’ve pressed every button but no good.
I’m afraid, I’m going to have to change suppliers. I can’t put up with this every three or four months. It was so easy before. Now it’s  just confusion. 
Geraldine Bruton Customer
Great company to deal with, been with them for many years. I trust them, great communicators.
Good supply but won’t fit a smart meter
App easy to use x

Used to be fine, but now everytime it asks username password and then otp. Just use faceid for god sake. It’s utility app not banking app. It’s easier to login to my banking app than this.
Also i moved my flat, so at new place i am given different account for electricity and gas.
Unable to login for a long period due to the some issues. App has been working for a while and no longer working again
Usually good app, however since recent update cannot sign in at all on app, please sort out asap
Excellent service, lots of options to choose from the best Tariff available on the app. I recommend for anyone looking for energy, use Scottish Power 👍
Changed to The overnight Tariff, to help charge our Evs. Along with the half price weekend offer it’s making a welcome saving in these tough times.
App sends to web version which sends OTP to email but no option on the app to enter OTP
Unable to sign in, just keeps going back to log in screen after entering password 😢

This app used to be great.  Not it’s rubbish. It would tell you the energy use every day, as soon as you entered meter readings your balance updated - it just worked really well (all features). But in the last 12 months or so it has gone downhill, as if it’s being developed by primary school children and now it’s useless. Full of bugs that are never fixed, basically the opposite of what it was a few years ago.
Yearly usage comparison disappeared. I found being able to show graph of two and three years comparison very helpful. That seems to have disappeared.
Very good company. Easy to handle with our bills. 🙏🙏🙏🙏
Why do the developers continually mess with things. I am now unable to submit meter readings via the app. Very poor and so annoying
Have been with Scottish Power for many years and I’m very happy about everything to with the company👍🏻
Electric meter changed but still have to send in readings. Gas meter still old one & still have to read meter ?

This app repeatedly refuses my meter readings and I have to go on live chat to submit them. Kind of defeats the purpose of having an app. Since re loading the app (on advice from agent) it now wont accept my login details till I try to open a new account. Then it logs in. It requires an authentication to log in to the account now but the emails sometimes take more than the 5 mins they allow before they come in. Very frustrating.  Is easier to go online and login to the account without the app. Its a complete waste of time on my iphone.
I find the app incredibly easy to operate. I just inserted the meter reading and received the price for the units I had used immediately. Fantastic app very handy and easy to use 👍

The app has been good so far but suddenly it is impossible to open the meter reading page. I have spoken to someone by chat who suggested deleting and reinstalling but that’s such a hassle. What do I do, just not give readings until sorted and no, I don’t want one of these fancy new meters. I just want a working app

Generally Scottish Power’s performance is good, their App works well & the information provided is helpful in managing electricity & gas usage. 
SP’s negative is that I’ve been waiting 7 months to have my gas meter upgraded to one that is compatible with a Smart Meter.

ReDirects you to the webpage each time..

What’s the point in using an app if it only directs me to the website to enter my login each and every time ? 

I might as well be without the app and visit the webpage myself .
Everything I need in the app. Scottish Power have great tariffs and targets. Luv it 🩷
Easy online use can see all my info and compare against other months
Very good website easy to navigate
The App is very easy to use and your up to date account is shown to you within 5/10 seconds

Please let us use the app if we’re on an older iPhone im post without the the app! I can’t update my phone to your NEW required level! Not fair on us oldies with old phones! Is there anyway I can get into the app without buying a new device not fair! Please let us use the old app too
New app great to send readings

I have been using my I phone Version 7 to keep up to date with my account. Now I can’t. What a useless change. I can’t afford a new phone.I am really annoyed with a thoughtless ‘improvement’. AlistairBrockie
While I get past the username / password and passcode stage, the app then just displays the spinner indefinitely. This was after I’d downloaded the latest version of the app onto a 2025 Apple iPad.
Updated the app, now I just see a white screen and I can’t log in. Did nobody think to test this update before releasing it?

The worst app I’ve ever used to top up my phone.

It doesn’t show the real account balance — everything is delayed or inaccurate. Information appears with a noticeable lag, so you’re never sure whether your top-up has actually been processed.

There’s no transparency, no real-time updates, and absolutely no sense of control over your own money. Extremely frustrating and unreliable.
Very nice and very good
Such a great app, makes keeping track of my power usage simple and clear.

My only complaint is myself that I didn’t switch over to Scottish power sooner , exceptional customer service , and are fair , they don’t try to rip you off or over charge you , and you speak to people that can communicate with good English so there’s no language barrier, I’m always recommending this company to friends and family thank you Scottish power
Daily views aren't available anymore
Quite helpful, I must say, very stringent on security aspects
Their customer service is the worst in the industry.
App stopped working on my phone. I tried to delete the app and re-download it now I am not even able to download the app.
Customer service responding after 1 hour, meter readings not getting submitted from last 2-3 years. Have to call every month to submit readings.
Very satisfied been with the company for duel  fuel many years
I’m very happy with the service I get from Scottish Power
Good happy
Always a good service although my smart meter in house monitor doesnt seem to be fully working i wish someone would come and fix it

I’m extremely annoyed that I can no longer access the app because I have an older phone! So it would seem I’m forced to buy a newer phone just so I can access the app and get up to date information about my account and the same applies to get into the web site!! Not so inclusive.
Very helpful;
